integration.presentation_aspect: live final game content width divided by height
integration.layout_variant: DEFAULT below 1.5 aspect and VARIANT_B at or above 1.5

phases.after: final upright GS texture draw into the OpenGL backbuffer
phases.before: FullscreenUI, OSD, ImGui, and Qt presentation

surfaces.native: normalized source crop dimensions before scaling

doc.boundary: PresentRect submits the completed upright GS destination after the final game draw. EndPresent submits the same frame after FullscreenUI, OSD, and ImGui and immediately before the emulator-owned OpenGL swap.
doc.evidence: Package linkage, patch application, live geometry, exact phase order, and forbidden-symbol absence are source gates. Real PlayStation 2 pixels and physical composition remain runtime gates.
